name: Ketu Dracotail
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>計都星辰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ケートゥ・ドラゴンテイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Add 1 "Dracotail" monster from your Deck to your hand, then if your opponent controls a monster, you can Fusion Summon 1 Dragon or Spellcaster monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. You can only activate 1 "Ketu Dracotail" per turn.
eff: Add 1 "Dracotail" monster from your Deck to your hand, then if your opponent controls a monster, you can Fusion Summon 1 Dragon or Spellcaster monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. You can only activate 1 "Ketu Dracotail" per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
